name: mageme/module-eu-withdrawal-receipt-verify-hyva
description: Hyva theme compatibility for mageme/module-eu-withdrawal-receipt-verify. Re-renders the public verify page at /withdraw-contract/verify/index/ using pure Tailwind utilities — no LESS, no jQuery, no KnockoutJS. Drops the LESS-compiled CSS bundle on Hyva theme storefronts. NOT legal advice — see README disclaimer.
